status.description: Room status: not_started, in_progress, ready_for_inspection, completed, blocked

phase.description: Current workflow phase for floor board placement

is_locked.description: When true, only an admin can edit room data

phase_lock_overrides.description: Per-phase worker locks: phase key -> true (locked for Montør/Lærling) or false (force open). Omitted keys use defaults: phases after room.phase locked; at or before room.phase open unless locked.

workflow_deviations.description: Structured deviations/notes for the room workflow (JSON array of { id, phase_key, text, status, created_at, resolved_at? }).

areas.description: Optional multi-area config (JSON array of { id, name, phase?, phase_lock_overrides? }). Null = single default area.

deadline_at.description: Optional target date/time for the work unit (for display and future automation).

checklist_labels.description: Optional map of workflow phase key -> custom checklist section title for that phase.
